message:
Command `# Check wrapper.v for JTAG vs SWD ports and amuxbus
grep -n "tck\|tms\|tdi\|trst_n\|swclk\|swdi\|swdo" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -20
echo "---amuxbus lines---"
grep -n "amuxbus" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -10
echo "---u_core instantiation (first 30 lines)---"
grep -n "u_core\b" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
2361:// NOTE (PnR fix): wrapper was generated with JTAG ports (tck/tms/tdi/trst_n)
2362:// but compute_ss uses SWD (swclk/swdi/swdo/swdo_en). Replaced with correct SWD
2367:    .swclk(1'b0),
2368:    .swdi(1'b0),
2369:    .swdo(),
2370:    .swdo_en(),
---amuxbus lines---
32:    inout clk_amuxbus_a,
33:    inout clk_amuxbus_b,
47:    inout reset_n_amuxbus_a,
48:    inout reset_n_amuxbus_b,
75:    inout pad_gpioa_0_amuxbus_a,
76:    inout pad_gpioa_0_amuxbus_b,
103:    inout pad_gpioa_1_amuxbus_a,
104:    inout pad_gpioa_1_amuxbus_b,
131:    inout pad_gpioa_2_amuxbus_a,
132:    inout pad_gpioa_2_amuxbus_b,
---u_core instantiation (first 30 lines)---
2364:mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
